name: Only Guy in Girl Asylum
description:
Welcome to Crotus, a dark haunted asylum with crazy people in it and thrilling events. As the only guy in a girls asylum, you’re both valued and targeted from the start!

For this one, you can take the story in a ton of directions because I added a ton of details. You can make it character focused and interact with one or multiple of the many crazy but fun ladies with unique backstories, or try to explore the asylum and its many secrets, or even try to escape the asylum and enter the eerie forest filled with cryptids on your escape! Or maybe try to take over the asylum?

I’m planning on expanding it more over time so check back weekly!

FemPOV/Male Inmates
creator: Tevin Anarchy
